title: JCB Real Estate Services
text: Users can view information about the realtor and services offered. As well as view events, and photos. Site was designed with in WordPress.

title: Style Me
text: Application that allows the user to upload photos of your clothing from your camera, computer or social media. Organize their clothes into outfits and categorize them by occasion, season, mood or whatever they like! This is a group project.

title: Gullible
text: Allows the user to search for movie or series information. Data is gathered from the omdb API.

title: Weather Dashboard
text: Allows the user to see the weather forecast of any city, as well as the forecast for the next 5 days. Data gathered from the weather API

title: JCB Real Estate Services
text: Users can view information about the realtor and services offered.
